note: Every prompt below is generated as: styleSignature (from brand.json) + subjectPrompt. Scenes -> webp via tools/imgkit.py. Icons/logo -> generated on solid white, then `imgkit keyout` to transparent PNG. Regenerate any asset by re-running its engine with the same prompt, then the listed post step.

assets.subjectPrompt: A single minimal logo emblem centered on a solid pure white background: a stylized leaping bass fish with a subtle lake ripple line, enclosed in a soft rounded-rectangle badge outline. Flat vector, even line weight, two-tone deep forest green (#0e342b) and warm gold (#f1b84b). Heritage outdoor brand feel.
Open leaping-fish line mark (reuses the icon-fish art) for tight spaces and favicon.
A serene local lake at dawn from a grassy bank, gentle mist, soft golden sunrise, distant treeline and reeds, open sky in the upper area. No people, no boats.
A moody calm lake at dusk, deep forest green and teal, dark water with subtle gold glints, silhouetted reeds and pine treeline. Darker exposure, for dark overlay panels.
Minimal line-art icon of a folded paper map with a location pin, on solid pure white. Even medium stroke, deep forest green line with warm gold accent on the pin.
Minimal line-art icon of a fishing lure with hook, on solid pure white. Deep forest green line with warm gold accent. Matches the icon set.
Minimal line-art icon of a clock showing a time window, on solid pure white. Deep forest green line with warm gold highlighted arc. Matches the icon set.
Minimal line-art icon of a leaping fish, on solid pure white. Deep forest green line with warm gold accent on the fin. Matches the icon set.
Wide horizontal button texture: rich deep forest green water surface at dawn with subtle warm gold reflections and a faint ripple, even lighting for centered button text. No objects, no text.
